All Classes

Class Summary 
Class Description
inputRow
inputRow is an abstract class which means it's never used directly.
inputRowBook
Extends inputRow.
inputRowBookSection
Extends inputRowBook.
inputRowConference
Extends inputRow.
inputRowFilm
Extends inputRow.
inputRowJournal
Extends inputRow.
inputRowPeriodical
Extends inputRow.
inputRowWebsite
Extends inputRow.
Main
Main creates the blank master GUI Window ready for inputRows to be added.
outputWindow
Creates the output window where the user can copy the output.
